subcodes.first_line: The Word of God hath appeared in truth; verily, it upholdeth the Cause of its Lord, the Sovereign of the Day of Separation. Lo, it beareth glad-tidings unto those who dwell on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمه الله ظهرت بالحق انها تنصر امر ربها مالک یوم الطلاق انها تبشر من علی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
